title: Sakaler Sure
desc: Bengali artists love devotional and folk songs. These songs inspire singers and audiences alike. They celebrate culture and faith, creating a shared experience.

title: Deewana
desc: Abhi falls for Shruti, the daughter of gangster Agnidev. However, under unfortunate circumstances, Shruti loses her memory, making Abhi try to convince her of their bond.

title: Rupban
desc: A royal heir must prove his love and worth while facing family pride, tradition, and hidden rivalries.

title: Agnipath
desc: Siblings Sujay, Ajay, and Bijay share a strong bond, but Bijay seeks revenge after Sujay is killed by his boss.

title: Daan Protidan
desc: A Rich Man Ashok Loses His Mental Balance After His Wife'S Death. His Cousin Brother Dilip Starts Torturing Him To Find Out Where He Kept His Cheque Books and Property Papers. Dilip'S Wife Expose Dilip.

title: Ashirbad
desc: Brijlal plots to kill his partner and his son. However, the son survives and years later, ends up falling in love with Brijlal's daughter.

title: Mouchak
desc: A man is flooded with marriage proposals after relocating for a job. The bad publicity intended to get him out of this predicament but when it he was to marry a woman he loves it becomes a hinderence.

title: Amar Prem
desc: Subho and Deepika struggle to unite owing to Deepika's father who disapproves of Subho. Meanwhile, her father betroths her to an evil man who is only interested in their family's property.

title: Pita Swarga Pita Dharma
desc: Pita Swarga Pita Dharma

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yog Rishi Swami Ramdev
desc: Baba Ramdev shows how yoga can help you. He explains different yoga poses. These poses can make your life healthier and less stressful. Learn yoga from Baba Ramdev!

title: Eso Maa Lakshmi
desc: Devotees celebrate Goddess Lakshmi with prayers, rituals and heartfelt devotion, seeking prosperity, blessings and harmony in their homes and lives.

title: Mone Mone
desc: After her father dies, Shakuntala makes and sells handicrafts to provide for her mother and brothers. Soumitra, a bachelor, falls in love with her.

title: Geet Sangeet
desc: Geet Sangeet

title: Satya Mithya
desc: Two women clash over serious allegations, uncovering secrets and tensions that test their strength and resolve, ultimately leading to unexpected revelations and personal growth.

title: Putra Badhu
desc: A family drama filled with emotional twists and heartfelt moments, highlighting the values of relationships, love, and the power of truth in difficult times.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
desc: Story of a father whose son left him in agony. The son not only refused to stand by his father, but also made him a slave in his own family.

title: Basanta Bilap
desc: The story revolves around a group of girls and a group of 4 boys from the neighborhood, a series of hilarious clashes between them eventually leading to their romance.

title: Barkane
desc: Sandip, an unemployed man, turns down Prakash Som's order to kill Tribeni, his political rival. When Tribeni learns about this, she decides to marry Sandip and offers a dowry to his greedy father.

title: Ostaad
desc: This is a love story between two college goers, a boy named Sanjay and the girl named Mili. Because of a bet Sanjoy tried to impress Mili, but in the process truly falls in love with her.
